26 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
indicates both beneficial and non-beneficial aspects, which must
be considered carefully.
RETRO MOTION
When planets move in clock-wise direction, it is called
direct motion of the planets. On the other hand when planets
move in anticlockwise direction, it is called Retro motion of the
planets. This principle does not apply to Dragon Head and Dragon
Tail, which always move in anti-clockwise direction.
Method of taking planetary positions of planets from the
